category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Georgia.

title.en: China-to-Georgia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入格鲁吉亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入喬治亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Georgia GEOSTM / GNERC / GSE requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, GNERC and distribution-network grid-connection requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Georgia is the Caucasus country with EU-alignment through DCFTA, not the US state.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与格鲁吉亚GEOSTM / GNERC / GSE要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、GNERC和配电网并网要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。格鲁吉亚为高加索地区国家，通过《深度及全面自由贸易区协定》与欧盟对接，非美国佐治亚州。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與喬治亞GEOSTM / GNERC / GSE要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、GNERC和配電網併網要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。喬治亞為高加索地區國家，通過《深度及全面自由貿易區協定》與歐盟對接，非美國喬治亞州。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Georgia (Caucasus country, not the US state), the confirmed practical gaps are: connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC) because Georgia's EU-aligned IEC infrastructure is physically incompatible with GB/T connectors; IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 safety evidence required under GEOSTM-adopted IEC standards; EMC conformity to IEC 61000 series; GNERC licensing and grid-connection coordination with the distribution-network operator (Telasi in Tbilisi, Energo-Pro Georgia in most other regions); and GEOSTM conformity marking to demonstrate compliance with adopted IEC/EN standards. Georgia is not a member of the EAEU — the EAC/TR CU certification route does not apply and must not be claimed. Georgia operates on 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, aligned with the European and IEC baseline. OCPP back-office interoperability is expected by major Georgian charge-point operators (e.g. E-Space, Tesla destination). As of 2026-06-14, a single mandatory whole-unit EVSE product certification regulation published by GEOSTM could not be confirmed from official sources; exporters should verify the current GEOSTM conformity assessment scope, HS code, charger type, and distribution-operator connection approval before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入格鲁吉亚（高加索地区国家，非美国佐治亚州）时，已确认的实务差距包括：由于格鲁吉亚与欧盟对接的IEC体系基础设施在物理上与GB/T接口不兼容，须将接口从GB/T 20234硬件重新设计为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）；GEOSTM采用的IEC标准要求IEC 61851-1及IEC 61851-23安全证据；须符合IEC 61000系列EMC标准；须通过GNERC许可并与配电网运营商（第比利斯为Telasi，其他大部分地区为Energo-Pro Georgia）协调并网；以及GEOSTM合格标志以证明符合已采用的IEC/EN标准。格鲁吉亚不是欧亚经济联盟成员——EAC/TR CU认证路径不适用，不得作出此类声明。格鲁吉亚采用220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，与欧洲和IEC基线一致。主要格鲁吉亚充电点运营商（如E-Space、特斯拉目的地充电）期望OCPP后台互操作。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认GEOSTM发布的适用于所有EVSE整机的强制产品认证法规；出口商应在出货前核实当前GEOSTM合格评定适用范围、HS编码、充电桩类型和配电运营商接入审批。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入喬治亞（高加索地區國家，非美國喬治亞州）時，已確認的實務差距包括：由於喬治亞與歐盟對接的IEC體系基礎設施在物理上與GB/T接口不兼容，須將接口從GB/T 20234硬件重新設計為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）；GEOSTM採用的IEC標準要求IEC 61851-1及IEC 61851-23安全證據；須符合IEC 61000系列EMC標準；須通過GNERC許可並與配電網運營商（第比利斯為Telasi，其他大部分地區為Energo-Pro Georgia）協調併網；以及GEOSTM合格標誌以證明符合已採用的IEC/EN標準。喬治亞不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員——EAC/TR CU認證路徑不適用，不得作出此類聲明。喬治亞採用220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，與歐洲和IEC基線一致。主要喬治亞充電點運營商（如E-Space、特斯拉目的地充電）期望OCPP後台互操作。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認GEOSTM發布的適用於所有EVSE整機的強制產品認證法規；出口商應在出貨前核實當前GEOSTM合格評定適用範圍、HS編碼、充電樁類型和配電運營商接入審批。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GEOSTM scope determination, GNERC licence, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Georgia conformity assessment rules, GNERC licensing requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Georgia (Caucasus) is not a member of the Eurasian Economic Union; EAC / TR CU certification claims do not apply.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GEOSTM适用范围裁定、GNERC许可、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行格鲁吉亚合格评定规则、GNERC许可要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。格鲁吉亚（高加索）不是欧亚经济联盟成员；EAC / TR CU认证声明不适用。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GEOSTM適用範圍裁定、GNERC許可、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行喬治亞合格評定規則、GNERC許可要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。喬治亞（高加索）不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員；EAC / TR CU認證聲明不適用。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
